title: Сottage Сheese Pancakes Totem of Undying
description: Resource pack replaces Totem of Undying with popular Food Pancakes сырники meme from Reddit with a modified texture
body:
- EN: **Cheesecakes** are a traditional dish of Eastern European, especially Slavic cuisine, which are cottage cheese pancakes or flatbreads fried in a pan. This resource pack replaces the totem of immortality in the photo of cheesecakes
  
- RU: **Сырники** это традиционное блюдо восточноевропейской, в особенности славянской кухни, представляющее собой творожные оладьи или лепёшки, обжаренные на сковороде. Этот ресурспак заменяет тотем бессмертия на фото сырников

[ALL RESOURCEPACKS COLLECTION: MEMES + STREAMERS](https://modrinth.com/collection/sfDcDGAi)

- [Тотем Я уже Красный](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mellstroy-(-)-totem-of-undying)
 
- [Тотем Меллстрой](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mellstroy-totem-of-undying)
 
- [Colored Bricks](https://modrinth.com/mod/colored-bricks-mod)
 
- [MACAN Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/macan-music-discs)
